characters.name: Kengyu
characters.description: Kengyu was a character in the manga who only appeared inChibiusa's Picture Diary Chapter 2 - Beware of Tanabata. He was the husband of Shokujo, and he failed to communicate with her regularly. This led to her sadness and worrying that their love had died; however, it turned out that he was only working more than usual to pay for a present for their 300th anniversary of Tanabata. After the misunderstanding was resolved, their relationship improved.
